mnemonics.title: GP Steps
mnemonics.content: SPK: Specify Prior → Compute Posterior → Kernel defines covariance

mnemonics.title: Kernel Types
mnemonics.content: RBF Matern Linear (RML) - Common kernel families

acronyms.usage: Core concept in non-parametric Bayesian modeling
Common stationary kernel in GP regression

visualTips.visualization: Imagine confidence bands widening in regions with less data
Plot sample functions: RBF (smooth), Matern (rough), Linear (straight-line)

analogies.analogy: Like a landscape of possible functions before seeing data
Similarity graph where nodes are data points and edges are kernel values
